title: Choosing a study design: assignment, selection, and time

objectives.statement: Classify experiments, prospective and retrospective cohorts, case-control studies, cross-sectional studies, and natural experiments from assignment, selection, and timing features.
Choose and justify a best-fit study design for a new question under stated ethical, temporal, outcome-frequency, and data-availability constraints.
State the strongest warranted inference and a material boundary for experimental, ordinary observational, and natural-experiment comparisons.

scenes.title: Choose from the comparison you can make
Enter the timeline in the right place
